mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category

SELECT DATE(collect_time) AS collectDate, COUNT(id) AS count FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND collect_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(collect_time) ORDER BY collectDate ASC
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND collect_date = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(verdict, '未分析') AS verdict, COUNT(id) AS count FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY verdict
